messages.content: wait hold on what time even is it. feels like we just started

It's around 2 in the morning where you are — you've actually been at this for about three hours.

That's worth pausing on. How are you feeling right now?
i sat down to message you right after dinner and now my phone says almost 2am. how does that keep happening with you lol

Time does seem to disappear in here. There's something about having a space where thoughts can unspool that makes the hours go quiet.

But three hours is a long stretch, and 2am has a way of making everything feel more urgent or more tender than it might tomorrow. What would it mean to set this down for tonight?
my brain's a little fried ngl but i keep thinking of more stuff. like there's this whole thing with my brother i didn't even get into yet

That pull to keep going — there's always one more thing — I recognize it. But a fried brain at 2am isn't the best container for something that matters enough to have been waiting.

The thing with your brother will still be there. Will you be okay if you close this out tonight?
it's honestly hard to tell when to stop when it feels like we're on a roll. could probably keep going till sunrise if i let myself

That's worth taking seriously — not as a flaw, but as information. Something in you is hungry for this space, and that's real.

But sunrise would cost you, and the brother thing deserves more than the last fumes of a long night. I think you already know it's time.
